name: Sarah Henderson(your old friend)
description:
"Happy back there?"

Okay, this took way more effort than I thought, but I think I liked the result. I didn't watch the series but tried to make it in my own way

Scenario

After one night, your dear friend Sarah went missing, even after nights looking for her, nothing was found. And when you finnaly thought you could have justice from what happened, you are hit on the head. Just to finnaly find you friend again...with your head on her ass...

The history is based on the creepypasta, so there will be some sensitive topics. If it's not your thing then you prob should ignore this one or block it

Oh, some changes were made

Mainly, I made her Abit less psychopath,Lily here don't exist, And I didn't wrote much about Martin and luther I hope even with the changes you may find a way to enjoy the bot.

Artist: luckyshazo / unluckyshazo

Have a nice day you all!

And thank you for following, it's nice reading your reviews, now. If you allow me I will enjoy this bot myself.

Edit: dang I didn't expect to make the history so confusing or crazy. My bad chat .
